name: list_projects
description: List all translation projects in the Smartcat account. Returns project metadata including name, languages, status, and document count. Supports filtering by project name substring and creation date range. Results are paginated.

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: Filter projects by name substring. Case-insensitive partial match.

parameters.name: createdDateFrom
parameters.description: Filter projects created on or after this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: createdDateTo
parameters.description: Filter projects created on or before this date. ISO 8601 format.
